prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-11FTCHSSKFSNG-3PC-11-SLVR-2 Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: 11" Full Tang Camping Hunting Survival Serrated Knife & Fire Starter Neon Green Description: The ASR Outdoor Full Tang Hunting Knife is a great addition to any camping or outdoor tools collection. Each knife is constructed of 440 stainless steel with a tanto point as well as serrated spine.

Additionally, these 11" knives include a magnesium rod fire starter, so you'll have fire in seconds if you need it. The paracord wrapped handle allow for a comfortable and easy grip in any situation.

Each knife includes a nylon sheath with a belt loop, and will come in handy in an emergency or survival situation. Search Terms: serrated knife camping knife hunting knife fixed blade hunting knives camping accessories camping gear camping supplies camping gear must haves pocket knives tactical knives pocket knives and folding knives 550 paracord tanto knife survival gear Features: - Length: 11" | Blade Material: 440 Steel - Paracord Wrapped Handle | Nylon Sheath w/ Belt Loop - Magnesium Rod Fire Starter - Serrated Spine | Tanto Point === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 11" Serrated Hunting Knife with Fire Starter

anthropic.title_differentiation: Full Tang 440 Steel, Tanto Point, Magnesium Fire Starter, Paracord Handle, Nylon Sheath
